analysis.summary: A surreal and narcotic exploration of insomnia where the narrator rejects salvation to drown their pain in a hypnotic loop of drinking and dissociation.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A translucent hand reaching out from a dark void but being slapped away by a shadowy figure, floating debris in the air.
An endless monorail track curving through a smoggy night sky with no destination visible, glowing faintly against black clouds.
A clear glass bottle reflecting the blue light of moonlight on a dusty wooden floor next to an overturned chair.
Glowing red veins pulsating rhythmically under pale skin, illuminating the darkness of a room with heavy shadows.
Thick grey smoke swirling into shapes that look like faces and memories before vanishing instantly in mid-air.
Giant mechanical hammers striking a surface made of bone, sending shockwaves through the air that distort vision.
A faint outline of a person walking alone down an empty hallway where walls bleed black liquid onto the floor.
A heavy chain made of smoke wrapped around a neck, dragging the figure forward into a mirror that shows nothing but darkness.

styleHint: Dark hypnotic hip-hop and R&B, 3 minutes, heavy 808 bounce, slow trap drums, eerie soul chords, ghostly vocal chops, distorted choir pads, late-night insomnia atmosphere, sticky repeated chant hook using the word “sleep,” male lead with high-pitched hypnotic ad-libs, female R&B background vocals, minimal lyrics, dark melodic bassline, sparse verses, surreal dream-state energy, narcotic groove, cinematic underground club feel, original vocal tone, no direct artist imitation.
